I work at Sucafina. I report to the director.
He oversees operations. She negotiates contracts.
I have worked in coffee for several years.
The industry has grown a lot recently.
Hi! I do not think we have met. I am Sarah Martinez, from the Geneva headquarters.
Nice to meet you, Sarah! I am Walyson Ginaldo Silva. I work at Sucafina here in Santos.
Santos! That is where all the magic happens. What do you do at the Brazil office?
I report directly to the director. I help oversee operations and work with stakeholders from different origins.
Interesting! I work on the trading desk. We negotiate contracts with buyers in Europe. How long have you been in the coffee industry?
I have worked with coffee commodities for several years now. My expertise is in the Brazilian market, especially sourcing from different regions.
That is great! We should definitely connect more. Here is my business card.
Thank you, Sarah! And here is mine. It is a pleasure to meet you.
I work at Sucafina, a coffee trading company.
I report directly to the director.
I am based in Santos, Brazil.
It is a pleasure to meet you.

Hi, this is David Chen from the Singapore office. I am calling about the green coffee shipment for Q3. We have a situation with the export clearance. The origin warehouse informed us that the quality certification has been delayed by ten days. I know this affects our delivery timeline for the European buyers. Could we schedule a call tomorrow to discuss options? I have already contacted our backup supplier in Colombia, and they might be able to cover part of the volume. Let me know what works for you. Thanks.

Good morning everyone. This is Sarah Martinez from the trading desk with a quick update on origin operations. We have completed the first round of quality assessments for the new crop season. Three origins met our premium grade requirements, and two exceeded our cupping score benchmarks. However, we identified a logistics bottleneck at the Santos port that we need to address before the next shipment window. The lead time for container booking has increased by approximately twelve percent compared to last season. I recommend we schedule a meeting with logistics and sales to align on the revised export calendar. Please review the report and let me know your availability for Thursday or Friday.

Walyson introduces himself at the summit. He explains his role at Sucafina. Sarah asks about the Santos port operations. They discuss the new crop season. They exchange business cards and agree to follow up.
